ROSALIA
  • Roman Research Nexus
  • View page source

Roman Research Nexus

The Roman Research Nexus is a web-based platform that provides access to a wide range of tools and resources for researchers working with data from the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope. The platform includes tools for data analysis, visualization, and collaboration, as well as access to documentation and support resources.

ROSALIA is in the process to be integrated into the Roman Research Nexus. We will update this section as soon as the integration is complete. Suggestions are welcome!

How to use ROSALIA in the Roman Research Nexus

Coming soon!
